message:
perf(core): eliminate MemDatabase::new() allocation per VDBE execution

execute_table_program_with_db swaps the Connection's MemDatabase into
the VDBE engine for the duration of execution. Previously it created
a fresh MemDatabase::new() placeholder per call — allocating SwissIndex,
Vec, and other internals that are immediately discarded.

Now uses a thread-local reusable placeholder. The placeholder is swapped
in while the real DB is in the engine, then swapped back out and cached
for the next execution. Saves ~50-100ns per row.

Applied to both execute_table_program_with_db and
execute_table_program_exactly_one_row_with_db.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
